query:
INSERT INTO heritageSites (name, location, category, description, latitude, longitude, currentVisitors, maxCapacity, createdAt, updatedAt) VALUES 
('Colosseum', 'Rome, Italy', 'monument', 'Ancient Roman amphitheater', 41.8902, 12.4924, 5234, 10000, NOW(), NOW()),
('Sagrada Familia', 'Barcelona, Spain', 'monument', 'Basilica under construction since 1883', 41.4036, 2.1744, 3421, 8000, NOW(), NOW()),
('Louvre Museum', 'Paris, France', 'museum', 'Worlds largest art museum', 48.8606, 2.3352, 8932, 15000, NOW(), NOW()),
('Great Wall', 'China', 'monument', 'Ancient defensive wall', 40.4319, 116.5704, 12000, 20000, NOW(), NOW()),
('Taj Mahal', 'Agra, India', 'monument', 'Mausoleum of white marble', 27.1751, 78.0421, 6543, 12000, NOW(), NOW()),
('British Museum', 'London, UK', 'museum', 'Museum of human history and culture', 51.5194, -0.1270, 7654, 14000, NOW(), NOW()),
('Acropolis', 'Athens, Greece', 'archaeology', 'Ancient Greek citadel', 37.9715, 23.7267, 4321, 9000, NOW(), NOW()),
('Statue of Liberty', 'New York, USA', 'monument', 'Colossal neoclassical sculpture', 40.6892, -74.0445, 2543, 5000, NOW(), NOW()),
('Uffizi Gallery', 'Florence, Italy', 'museum', 'Renaissance art museum', 43.7674, 11.2556, 5432, 10000, NOW(), NOW()),
('Angkor Wat', 'Cambodia', 'archaeology', 'Largest religious monument in the world', 13.3667, 103.8667, 3210, 8000, NOW(), NOW());
